Home / Services / Leak Detection

Leak Detection

Advanced leak detection services to prevent costly water damage.

Hidden leaks can cause significant damage to your Phoenix home, especially with our prevalent stucco and tile roof construction. Undetected leaks can lead to mold growth, structural damage, and sky-high water bills. Phoenix Plumbers & Drain Clean Services uses advanced leak detection technology to pinpoint the source of any leak, no matter how hidden.

Our experienced technicians use acoustic listening devices, infrared cameras, and other specialized tools to locate leaks behind walls, under floors, and in underground pipes. We can accurately identify the source of the leak without causing unnecessary damage to your property. Once the leak is located, we provide expert repair services to stop the leak and prevent further damage.

Don't let a hidden leak drain your wallet and damage your home. Call Phoenix Plumbers & Drain Clean Services for professional leak detection services.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Conduct a Thorough Inspection
  2. 02 Step 2: Utilize Advanced Leak Detection Equipment
  3. 03 Step 3: Pinpoint the Source of the Leak
  4. 04 Step 4: Provide Repair Solutions

Benefits

  • Accurate Leak Detection
  • Prevention of Water Damage
  • Reduced Water Bills
  • Protection of Your Property

Frequently Asked Questions

How can I tell if I have a hidden leak?

Signs of a hidden leak include unexplained increases in your water bill, damp spots on walls or ceilings, and the sound of running water when no fixtures are in use.

What is acoustic leak detection?

Acoustic leak detection uses sensitive microphones to listen for the sound of water escaping from a pipe.

How much does leak detection cost?

The cost of leak detection varies depending on the complexity of the job. We provide upfront estimates before starting any work.

Get a Free Estimate
